strategic_objectives: Improve renewal-risk visibility across Customer Success
Make account health review more consistent without expanding the pilot scope

business_objectives.objective_statement: Improve account health review coverage and reduce stale renewal actions.
business_objectives.challenge: Customer Success context is spread across notes, support, usage, renewal, and playbook sources.
business_objectives.initiative: AI-assisted account health review using Search, Assistant, approved Skills, and governed workflow agents.
business_objectives.positive_business_outcome: Customer Success can review risk and renewal actions more consistently with explicit governance caveats.

use_cases.name: AI-assisted account health review
use_cases.description: Customer Success uses Search, Assistant, approved Skills, and governed workflow agents to prepare aggregate-safe account health review inputs for human approval.
use_cases.impact_rationale: Account health review coverage and action freshness are leading indicators for renewal-risk operating discipline.
use_cases.effort_rationale: The workflow uses existing account review motions and synthetic aggregate evidence only.
uncertainties: Real customers may define account health and renewal risk differently
Customer-owned assumptions must replace synthetic assumptions before a real pilot
